# Prime Outdoor Experts LLC

> Owner-operated landscaping company serving the Orlando metro area in Central Florida. Founded 2025. Specializes in residential lawn care, commercial and HOA landscape maintenance, irrigation, landscape design and installation, tree and shrub care, and seasonal cleanup. Licensed and insured. Same crew every visit, photo-documented service report after every visit. 5.0 ★ Google rating.

## Core Services
- [Lawn Care](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/services/lawn-care/) — Weekly and bi-weekly mowing, edging, trimming, fertilization. Specialists in St. Augustine, Bahia, and Zoysia turf for Central Florida climate.
- [Landscape Design & Installation](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/services/landscape-design-installation/) — New beds, sod, plant selection, hardscape coordination, irrigation tie-in.
- [Irrigation Systems](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/services/irrigation-systems/) — Repair, smart controllers, audits, retrofit, water-restriction-compliant scheduling for SJRWMD service area.
- [Tree & Shrub Care](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/services/tree-shrub-care/) — Pruning, palm care, oak canopy management, shrub shaping.
- [Landscape Enhancements](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/services/landscape-enhancements/) — Seasonal color rotations, mulching, edging, refresh projects.
- [Seasonal Cleanup](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/services/seasonal-cleanup/) — Hurricane prep, post-storm cleanup, annual refresh, dethatching.
- [Sustainable Landscaping](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/services/sustainable-landscaping/) — Florida-Friendly Landscaping practices, native plants, water-wise design.
- [HOA Maintenance Programs](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/services/hoa-maintenance-programs/) — Custom monthly contracts for gated communities and master-planned developments.

## Commercial Property Types
- [HOA Communities](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/commercial-landscaping/hoa-communities/)
- [Office Parks](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/commercial-landscaping/office-parks/)
- [Retail Centers](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/commercial-landscaping/retail-centers/)
- [Apartment Complexes](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/commercial-landscaping/apartment-complexes/)
- [Medical Campuses](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/commercial-landscaping/medical-campuses/)
- [Industrial Facilities](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/commercial-landscaping/industrial-facilities/)
- [Hospitality & Hotels](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/commercial-landscaping/hospitality-hotels/)

## Service Areas
Prime Outdoor Experts serves residential and commercial properties across Orange and Seminole counties in Central Florida.

- [Winter Park, FL](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/locations/winter-park-fl/)
- [Lake Nona, FL](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/locations/lake-nona-fl/)
- [Dr. Phillips, FL](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/locations/dr-phillips-fl/)
- [Windermere, FL](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/locations/windermere-fl/)
- [Lake Mary, FL](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/locations/lake-mary-fl/)
- [Maitland, FL](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/locations/maitland-fl/)
- [Altamonte Springs, FL](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/locations/altamonte-springs-fl/)
- [Sanford, FL](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/locations/sanford-fl/)
- [Winter Garden, FL](https://primeoutdoorexperts.com/locations/winter-garden-fl/)

## Quick Facts
- **Founded:** 2025
- **Location:** Sanford, Florida (Greater Orlando metro)
- **Service area:** Orange and Seminole counties
- **Phone:** (407) 443-4505
- **Email:** info@primeoutdoorexperts.com
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 7:00 AM – 5:00 PM, Saturday 8:00 AM – 1:00 PM
- **Google rating:** 5.0 (28 reviews)
- **Differentiators:** Owner-operated · Same crew every visit · Photo-documented service report after every visit · No subcontracting · 2-hour quote response
